extension.name: Itemmanager
extension.description: Manager to renew and update items booked by memberships
extension.releaseNotes: - Add LineItem Edit, Cancel and Add forms for inline contribution editing - Add FutureContributionScan page with batched AJAX analysis and composition checks - Add ItemMaintenance page for global line item analysis across all contacts - Migrate Dashboard, ItemmanagerSetting and UpdateItems from API3 to API4 - Add orphaned MembershipPayment cleanup to UpdateItems - Fix false-positive price change display (precision mismatch) - Add full German (de_DE) translation for SOLAWI context - Add comprehensive PHPUnit test suites (settings, dashboard, util, updateitems, lineitemedit, maintenance, migration) - Lazy-load stub pages for improved performance
